user.title: Set up Keba KeContact
user.description: Enter the IP address of your Keba KeContact charger.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the charger. Please check the IP address and ensure the charger is accessible on your network.
error.timeout_connect: Connection timeout. The charger did not respond. Please verify the IP address and network connectivity.

data_description.vehicle_soc_entity: Select the sensor entity that reports your vehicle's current battery level (SoC). Required for AI smart charging.
data_description.battery_capacity_kwh: Total battery capacity of the vehicle in kWh. Used by AI to calculate charging time.
data_description.departure_time: Time when you need the vehicle ready. AI will optimize charging to finish by this time.

data_description.anthropic_api_key: Your Anthropic API key for AI-powered charging optimization. Get one at console.anthropic.com
data_description.nordpool_entity: Select the Nordpool sensor entity that provides electricity prices.
